Handheld cinematic frame of SCARLETT in a clean white tank top and coral lipstick stepping onto the wide Bondi Beach promenade at morning light, muscles mid-tension and glancing back over her shoulder as wind lifts her hair, surfers carving white lines across the deep blue ocean behind her, vast open coastal path receding toward the horizon with pale sand tones visible at the edges, bright natural daylight with crisp directional shadows and high-key airy atmosphere, shallow depth of field keeping the foreground subject sharp against softly blurred ocean and waves, modern social-first product photography style with true-to-life color and tactile editorial energy

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - wide promenade with ocean views and surfers in the background
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
